_comment: OpenCode Configuration for Premium UI/UX Website Development - $100k Worth Setup

21st-dev-magic.description: 21st.dev Magic MCP - AI-powered UI component generation from natural language descriptions. Like v0 but in your IDE. Supports 20+ layouts, 35+ components, and 19 animations.

magic-ui.description: Magic UI MCP - Official MCP server for Magic UI components. Access blur fade animations, marquee logos, grid backgrounds, and premium animated components.

aceternity-ui.description: Aceternity UI MCP - Premium animated components with 3D effects, parallax, and cinematic animations. Access the most premium UI components available.

shadcn-ui.description: Shadcn UI MCP - Access 200+ shadcn/ui components and blocks. Provides component search, installation instructions, and code generation.

tailwind-css.description: Tailwind CSS MCP - Utility class documentation, color palette generation, and responsive design assistance.

motion-dev.description: Motion.dev MCP - Animation code generation for React, JavaScript, and Vue. Production-quality animation components with offline documentation.

framer-motion.description: Documentation MCP - Unified access to Next.js, Tailwind, Framer Motion docs with intelligent search and code examples.

rive-animations.description: Rive MCP - Interactive animations and micro-interactions. Build lightweight, runtime animations for web.
